case_title: DIRECT MAIL CENTER VS. COLOR TECH CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,561.19 FILED BY DIRECT MAIL CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT COLOR TECH CORPORATION KESECKER, SHARLI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-05-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIRECT MAIL CENTER
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-17-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KESECKER, SHARLI

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-05-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-05-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO SHARLI KESECKER BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF MAR-05-2008 AT 10:00AM.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIRECT MAIL CENTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COLOR TECH CORPORATION $2,561.19 PRINCIPAL, $250.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,811.19, DEFENDANT SHARLI KESECKER IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-17-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT COLOR TECH CORPORATION
